title: pteris pubescens
intro: Pteris pubescens, also known as the hairy fern or pubescent brake fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pteris pubescens include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and supporting the immune system. Pteris pubescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder for use in herbal remedies, although its availability and efficacy may vary depending on the region and preparation method.
